dimensions.label: Problem clarity
dimensions.question: Is the customer, pain, and current workaround specific?

dimensions.label: Evidence
dimensions.question: What proof exists from users, market data, comparable projects, or repository signals?

dimensions.label: Differentiation
dimensions.question: Why should this exist now and why is it meaningfully different?

dimensions.label: MVP scope
dimensions.question: Can the first version be built with the available team, time, and budget?

dimensions.label: Distribution
dimensions.question: How will the first users discover and try it?

dimensions.label: Demo readiness
dimensions.question: Can a judge, mentor, user, or investor understand the value in under two minutes?

dimensions.label: Submission quality
dimensions.question: Is the pitch, application, or project page complete, concrete, and credible?
